## Study: the-census

THE canonical census: every registered metric over 1,000 unselected worlds (seeds 0-999, default pins) — the project's queryable dataset (census-as-data spec §1) and the CI determinism guard. Subsumes the retired branches-family run column-for-column.

Seeds 0..1000 × 1 pin set(s); 1000 rows; 0 refusals.
